build.notes: Build passes with performance warnings only (acceptable)

testsPerformed.notes: displayFilters=false correctly hides filter dropdown (variation 3). displayPerPage=false correctly hides per-page selector (variations 3 and 5).
Variation 4 uses custom heading 'Find What You're Looking For' and custom placeholder 'Type keywords here...' - both render correctly.
Pagination mode shows numbered pagination with progress bar. Load-more mode shows Load More button with data-next-page and data-max-pages attributes.
Variation 4 uses postsPerPage=6, correctly displays 6 results per page instead of default 9.
Without search query, block displays all results. No results state message exists in PHP template (line 248-249).

testsRun.notes: Search input accepts text, placeholder renders correctly
Filter select dropdown opens showing all public post types

interactiveBehavior.notes: Full AJAX interaction testing requires executing JavaScript which is beyond static QA scope. JavaScript file (Search.js) implements: form submission, filter selection, per-page change, pagination clicks, load-more, clear-all, filter pill removal, browser back/forward (popstate), and URL state management via pushState.

checks.notes: Block uses <section> element with aria-labelledby pointing to heading
Form element has role='search' and aria-label='Site search' (line 75)
Results container has aria-live='polite', aria-label='Search results', and tabindex='-1' for focus management (line 193)
Button has aria-label='Search' and visible text 'Search' (lines 93-95)
Button has aria-label='Clear all filters' and visible text 'Clear All' (lines 130-132)
Filter pill buttons have visible text from post type label (line 178)
Load More button missing aria-disabled and aria-busy attributes in PHP template. JavaScript adds them dynamically (Search.js lines 243-244), but they should be present in initial markup.
checks.fix: Add aria-disabled='false' and aria-busy='false' to button initial state in PHP template line 208-214

semanticHtml.notes: Heading hierarchy correct (h2 for block heading, h3 for card titles). Form elements properly structured. Lists not applicable. Buttons and links correctly distinguished.

keyboardNavigation.notes: JavaScript implements keyboard support for filter pills (Enter/Space keys) in Search.js lines 174-180, 195, 213-219. All form controls are natively keyboard accessible.

ariaAttributes.notes: All required ARIA attributes present: search form role, aria-labels for all form controls, aria-live for results, aria-label for pagination nav, loading spinner has role='status'.

colorContrast.notes: Uses theme color tokens. Light mode block with charcoal text on off-white background. Card borders use charcoal. Accent colors for pills use theme tokens. All meet WCAG AA.

images.notes: Search icon is decorative (pointer-events-none). Loading spinner SVG is in status region with aria-label. Card images not applicable (search results use excerpts).

markupDuplication.notes: No responsive duplication detected. Layout adapts via CSS (max-sm:w-full, max-sm:ml-0). No JS-based cloning patterns.

attributeExtraction.notes: PHP does NOT manually extract attributes. Uses auto-extracted variables correctly.

docblock.issue: Missing @var docblock for camelCase attribute variables (postsPerPage, paginationMode, displayFilters, displayPerPage, searchPlaceholder)
docblock.fix: Add docblock at top of PHP file listing all camelCase variables with @var annotations to prevent PHP_CodeSniffer warnings

structureSync.notes: TSX and PHP structures match. Both use: section.search with py-gap-8, div.container with grid gap-gap-7, h2.text-header-1, div.search-inner with grid gap-gap-5. Conditional rendering matches between TSX (FilteredServerSideRender) and PHP (displayFilters, displayPerPage checks).

innerBlocks.reason: Block does not use inner blocks

testPageVariations.title: Minimal - No Filters, No Per Page

queryVarRegistration.notes: post_type_filter and search query vars registered on lines 13-14

files.notes: Renders post type pill, title, excerpt, Learn More button as specified
Implements AJAX filtering, URL state management, pagination, load-more

issues.description: Missing @var docblock in PHP template for camelCase attribute variables
issues.fix:
Add docblock after opening comment:

<?php
/**
 * Search block template.
 *
 * Renders a site-wide search that queries all public post types
 * with post-type filtering, keyword search, and pagination.
 *
 * Available variables (auto-extracted from $attributes):
 * @var string $anchor
 * @var string $heading
 * @var string $searchPlaceholder
 * @var bool $displayFilters
 * @var bool $displayPerPage
 * @var int $postsPerPage
 * @var string $paginationMode
 */

This prevents PHP_CodeSniffer warnings for camelCase variable names.

issues.description: Load More button missing initial aria-disabled and aria-busy attributes in PHP template
issues.fix:
Update Load More button markup to include initial ARIA states:

<button
	type="button"
	class="btn-secondary"
	data-next-page="<?php echo esc_attr( $paged + 1 ); ?>"
	data-max-pages="<?php echo esc_attr( $query->max_num_pages ); ?>"
	aria-disabled="false"
	aria-busy="false"
>
	<?php esc_html_e( 'Load More', 'takt' ); ?>
</button>

JavaScript updates these dynamically (Search.js lines 243-244), but initial state should be in markup for accessibility.

issues.description: Progress bar below pagination uses inline styles instead of data attributes for progressive enhancement

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors
Block registers correctly with apiVersion 3
All attributes defined with correct types and defaults
Query var 'post_type_filter' registered in archive-query-vars.php
PHP does NOT manually extract attributes (correct pattern)
TSX and PHP structure match exactly
Conditional rendering works correctly (displayFilters, displayPerPage)
Test page contains all 5 specified variations
Search card template (parts/card-search.php) renders correctly
AJAX JavaScript implementation present and structured correctly
Pagination vs Load More modes render correctly
Search form has role='search' and proper ARIA labels
Results container has aria-live='polite' for screen reader updates
Loading spinner has role='status' and aria-label
Pagination has nav element with aria-label
Filter pills have visible labels and keyboard support
No markup duplication for responsive behavior
Custom heading and placeholder text render correctly
Variable postsPerPage (6, 9) works correctly
Semantic HTML structure correct (section, form, nav, h2, h3)
